summary: Staff My Pricing Module - All features tested and working. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped due to rate limiting). Frontend: All UI tests passed - My Pricing page loads, staff can view cost margins and set customer margins.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) after multiple logins - expected behavior

critical_code_review_comments: staff.py (line 316-363): customer-margins endpoint correctly allows staff to update own margins and reseller to update staff's margins
pricing.py (line 476-750): calculate-price correctly handles staff users with 3-tier margin system (Admin → Staff Cost → Customer)
StaffMarginsPage.jsx: Clean UI with 'Your Cost (Set by Reseller)' section and 'Your Customer Margins' inputs with example pricing breakdown
ResellerDashboard.jsx (line 185-204): Correctly shows My Pricing button for staff using isStaff() check instead of Settings button
seed_data_creation: staff1@test.com already exists with margins: CMT 30%, Fabric 30% (cost margins set by reseller)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff pricing module fully tested. Key endpoints: PATCH /api/staff/{email}/customer-margins (staff sets own customer margins), PATCH /api/staff/{email}/margins (reseller sets staff cost margins), POST /api/pricing/calculate-price (returns is_staff_pricing: true for staff users with 3-tier breakdown). Rate limiting after 5 logins/minute.

staff_my_pricing_page_loads.test: Page loads correctly for staff users
staff_my_pricing_page_loads.details: Page shows title 'My Pricing', cost margins from reseller, customer margin inputs, and example pricing breakdown

staff_views_cost_margins.test: Staff can view cost margins set by reseller
staff_views_cost_margins.details: Shows CMT 30%, Fabric 30%, Styling 0%, Shipping 0% as set by reseller

staff_sets_customer_margins.test: Staff can set and save customer margins
staff_sets_customer_margins.details: CMT, Fabric, Styling, Shipping margin inputs work, Save button shows success toast

pricing_calculation_staff.test: Pricing calculation applies staff margins correctly
pricing_calculation_staff.details: Returns is_staff_pricing: true, includes staff_cost_margin_percent and cost_before_reseller_margin in breakdown

dashboard_my_pricing_button.test: Staff dashboard shows My Pricing button instead of Settings
dashboard_my_pricing_button.details: data-testid='my-pricing-btn' visible for staff, data-testid='settings-btn' hidden
